title: Prior-only driver-race rolling pace and wear trends
summary: Compute lagged, shifted rolling, and EWMA features within each Driver-Race-Year sequence to describe recent tyre degradation and pace trend before the current lap.
rationale: Several run variants attempted prior-only rolling signals, and they are domain-plausible for tyre cliff behavior. They were less consistently strong than final-stint windows but remain a distinct causal mechanism.
implementation_hint: Temporarily sort by Year, Race, Driver, and LapNumber; for LapTime_Delta, Cumulative_Degradation, Position_Change, and TyreLife, add previous value, previous delta, shifted rolling means, shifted EWMA, and cumulative positive degradation up to the previous lap. Restore original row order before modeling.
expected_effect: Small AUC gain with medium-low confidence; potentially useful as a diversification feature block.
risk: Using current or future rows in rolling windows would leak. Use transform or explicit reindexing to avoid groupby alignment failures.
